All clean. The fix replaced the single `datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()` on line 209 with `workflow.now().isoformat()`. The `workflow.now()` call (from `temporalio.workflow`, already imported) returns a deterministic, replay-safe datetime. The unused `from datetime import datetime, timezone` import was also removed.

No other non-deterministic calls (`random`, `uuid4`, `time.time`, etc.) were found in the workflow methods.
